sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ وَلَدٌ اسْمُهُ زُبَيْرٌ أَنْ يَصِيدَ سَمَكًا.
sentences.translation: Dječak po imenu Zubejr je htio loviti ribu.
sentences.translationEn: A boy named Zubayr wanted to catch fish.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ إِلَى النَّهْرِ بِقَضِيبٍ وَانْتَظَرَ طَوِيلًا.
sentences.translation: Otišao je na rijeku sa štapom za pecanje i dugo čekao.
sentences.translationEn: He went to the river with a fishing rod and waited a long time.

sentences.arabic: أَخِيرًا شَعَرَ بِسَمَكَةٍ فِي الْخَيْطِ وَسَحَبَهَا بِحَذَرٍ.
sentences.translation: Konačno je osjetio ribu na udici i pažljivo je izvukao.
sentences.translationEn: Finally he felt a fish on the line and carefully pulled it out.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ صَغِيرَةً فَأَرْجَعَهَا إِلَى الْمَاءِ وَابْتَسَمَ.
sentences.translation: Bila je mala pa ju je vratio u vodu i nasmiješio se.
sentences.translationEn: It was small so he put it back in the water and smiled.
